> Part of [[ai-registry|AI Registry]]


# Attio

Next-generation AI-native CRM. In active evaluation for Janus's CRM selection (see [[janus-crm-selection]]). Initial desk review May 2026; first vendor demo June 10, 2026 (Andrew Soane + Moses Francis / Attio); full personalised demo June 11, 2026 (Andrew + Jehad).

## Demo findings — June 10, 2026

Per [[2026-06-10-andrew-soane-attio-demo]]:

- **Core proposition confirmed as relational data model**, not just CRM — tracks any dataset via custom objects and API connections. Fits Janus's B2B2B hierarchy requirement (grandparent/parent/child companies).
- **MCP server** built alongside the data model (not retrofitted). Confirmed agent-native.
- **Call transcription built in** — Attio records calls, parses to the relevant record, enables in-call query. Potential Fireflies replacement; Andrew noted Attio handles per-seat speaker differentiation (contrast with Fireflies' shared-mic attribution failures).
- **Workflows:** Visual builder, conditional logic, Xero/Linear API connections demonstrable.
- **Full demo June 11** scheduled at 11:30 BST. Andrew bringing an engineer (likely Jehad). Use-case: Singapore white paper lead capture flow (form → CRM → auto-reply).

## Evaluation status

- Part of a 4-vendor shortlist (one vendor dropped Jun 9 for being too rigid)
- Decision expected week of June 16
- Janus was Attio's 5th vendor call that week
- [[twenty]] is the other top contender as of June 10 (per [[janus-crm-selection]])


---

## AI Registry — AIR-76

> [[linear|Linear]]: [AIR-76](https://linear.app/janusd/issue/AIR-76/attio) · status **Evaluating** · updated 2026-05-05.

**Category:** CRM / AI-Powered Customer Relationship Management
**Cost:** Free; Plus $29/$36; Pro $69/$86; Enterprise custom
**Departments:** Marketing
**Entity:** Attio Ltd. (London, UK)

## Overview

Next-generation AI-native CRM for GTM teams. Flexible adaptive data model, built-in AI ("Ask Attio"), workflow automation, email sequences, reporting. Modern alternative to [[salesforce|Salesforce]]/HubSpot. Targets scale-ups and SaaS. Customers: Bravado, Flatfile, Snackpass, YC-backed startups.

## Key Capabilities

* **Ask Attio** — AI for account research, deal reviews, pipeline health
* **AI Agents** — lead qualification, enrichment, stakeholder identification
* **Workflow Automation** — visual builder, conditional logic, triggers
* **Email Sequences** — campaigns, scheduling, bulk sending
* **Reporting** — real-time, funnel analysis, time comparisons
* **Custom Objects & Data Model** — fully flexible
* **Data Enrichment** — automatic company/people enrichment
* **Call Intelligence**
* **MCP Server** — AI agent integration

## Integrations

* Gmail/Outlook (Chrome extension)
* **Slack** — official app V1.8
* Outreach, Mixmax
* Segment, Hightouch
* Mailchimp
* Zapier + native workflow builder
* REST API on ALL plans
* App SDK, MCP server, webhooks
* Import: CSV, Excel, Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Zoho

## Security & Compliance

* ISO 27001 (A-LIGN audit), GDPR, CCPA
* **SAML 2.0 SSO — Enterprise only**
* Google SSO — all plans
* DPA references EU AI Act compliance

## Considerations

* SSO (SAML) Enterprise-only — pricing implications
* **No explicit AI training exclusion in ToS or DPA** — vendor clarification needed
* Pro plan ($69) likely minimum for Marketing

*Evaluating. Functional tier.*
